data.body: One trick I use with cauliflower rice that's a little tedious but gets pretty good results for me is long ass microwaving, with frequent fluffing/removing water. I usually have the frozen stuff and what I'll generally do is microwave maybe three or four minutes until it's melted and letting off
data.author: did:plc:lgdwxqfauevkk4kwtlhv56kw

data.body: It does pretty significantly reduce in volume and they can end up too salty at the end. Will your house end up with a little bit of that farty overcooked cauliflower smell, yes, But the results are pretty neutral taste-wise. Anyway tldr, microwave the fuck out of it frequently fluffing to let out
